eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Morton; Mercer; Oliver; Grant; Sioux, ND; at 8:55 AM on JUL 10, 2019 Effective until 9:55 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test of the Morton County Emergency Alert System. This concludes the test.
